name: nab
description: Manage YNAB budgets, accounts, transactions, and categories using the nab CLI. Built for both humans and AI agents.

setup.instructions: Install nab via Homebrew (`brew install kfriede/tap/nab`) or run `nab cowork setup --dir ~/Cowork` to prepare a Cowork workspace. Set NAB_TOKEN and NAB_BUDGET environment variables.
